title: Session 50: Combining the Fundamental Theorem and the Mean Value Theorem
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview We’ve seen how definite integrals and the mean value theorem can be used to prove inequalities. In this session we see that FTC1 renders MVT obsolete and review an exam problem on the MVT.

Worked Example Estimating ln(5)
